control-size.$description: dimension used by the radio component for control size.

dot-size.$description: dimension used by the radio component for dot size.

min-target.$description: dimension used by the radio component for min target.

gap.$description: dimension used by the radio component for gap.

control-radius.$description: dimension used by the radio component for control radius.

border-width.$description: dimension used by the radio component for border width.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the radio component for label font size.

font-weight.$description: font weight used by the radio component for label font weight.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the radio component for label line height.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected rest foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected rest border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected hover background. Brief §1: onmars hover is neutral (hover_overlay / surface em ramp), matching ki-checkbox unchecked hover (s1); the former primary-tinted alpha is the M3 state-layer pattern and stays in radio.material3.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected hover foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected hover border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected active background. Brief §1: neutral surface em ramp one step above hover (s1→s2), matching ki-checkbox unchecked active; the primary-tinted alpha stays in radio.material3.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected active foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected active border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected disabled background.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected disabled foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for unselected disabled border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected rest background.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected rest foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for selected rest border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected hover background. Brief §1: onmars hover is neutral (hover_overlay / surface em ramp); the primary-tinted alpha stays in radio.material3.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected hover foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for selected hover border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected active background.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected active foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for selected active border.

bg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected disabled background.

fg.$description: color used by the radio component for selected disabled foreground.

border.$description: color used by the radio component for selected disabled border.

color.$description: color used by the radio component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the radio component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the radio component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the radio component for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring at 40% — specs/002-ki-button/design-extraction.md §2.5, same double mechanism as ki-button: glow plus the opaque indicator).
